items.title: SEC Investor Advisory Committee to Host June 4 Meeting
items.raw_excerpt: The Securities and Exchange Commission’s Investor Advisory Committee will hold a public meeting at the SEC Headquarters in Washington D.C. on June 4 at 10 a.m. ET to discuss private markets, passive index funds, and recommendations regarding fund…
